hero.title: The open-source platform for communities that trade, collaborate, and grow.
hero.subtitle: Organizations, opportunities, commerce, messaging, and Web3 — one white-label stack you can clone today.
hero.pitch: Ring Platform is the reference implementation behind every Ring-powered ring: verified Entities, tiered Opportunities, a multi-vendor Store, integrated wallet and payments, Messenger, News, and AI opportunity matching — built on React 19, Next.js 16, Auth.js v5, and a PostgreSQL-first data layer. Clone it free from GitHub and self-host, or move to Ringdom when you want LegioX-guided ringization and managed operations.
hero.appPublisher: Published by Sonoratek LLC (Ringdom, Arizona) 🇺🇦 — our gift to the world, with gratitude for everyone who helped Ukraine prove its right to independence
features: Entities — organization profiles with public → confidential visibility tiers
Opportunities — offers, requests, and customization briefs with AI matcher alerts
Multi-vendor Store — WayForPay, wallet rails, orders, and vendor settlements
Messenger & notifications — real-time collaboration without Firebase lock-in
Web3 wallet — RING token economy, staking hooks, and an NFT marketplace module
White-label core — ring-config, locales, and modular features per clone

appPublisher.title: Sonoratek LLC — App publisher
appPublisher.subtitle: Sonoratek LLC (Tempe, Arizona) is the Ringdom legal entity that publishes Ring — with gratitude for everyone who helped Ukraine prove its right to independence 🇺🇦
appPublisher.missionText: Technology should unite, not divide. Ring enables anyone, anywhere to solve collective needs without expensive developers or vendor lock-in.
appPublisher.philosophyText: Ukrainian farmers can deploy the same sophisticated platform as Silicon Valley startups. African artisans access the same AI-powered marketplace as Amazon.
appPublisher.originSubtitle: How Ringdom built Ring during Ukraine's struggle for independence
appPublisher.beginningText: As Russia invaded Ukraine, we witnessed how technology could be a weapon of oppression. Centralized platforms controlled by foreign entities could be shut down or manipulated. We decided to build something different.
appPublisher.buildingText: Working from basements and cafes during air raids, we developed Ring - a platform that puts power back in the hands of communities. No more vendor lock-in, no more expensive developers, no more centralized control.
appPublisher.impactText: Ring deployments are helping communities worldwide. From agricultural cooperatives in Ukraine to artisan marketplaces in Kenya, Ring is proving that sophisticated technology can be accessible to everyone.
appPublisher.worldMapText: See Ring deployments, use cases per region, and success metrics from live deployments worldwide.
appPublisher.futureQuote: Imagine asking your Ring platform: 'Add a blockchain-verified certificate system for educational courses' - and watching as the platform autonomously generates the module, deploys smart contracts, updates the UI, and tests itself. No developers in the middle. You talk directly to your platform. This is our roadmap.
appPublisher.roadmap2025q2: ✅ Live on flagship rings: Next.js 16 + Turbopack, React 19, Auth.js v5, PostgreSQL/PostGIS, modular i18n, marketplace and opportunities, Ringdom Maps–class integrations, and white-label propagation (Ring Platform v1.49+ lineage).
appPublisher.roadmap2025q3: 🔧 In progress: LegioX MCP and NODUS-aligned operator workflows, richer AI-CONTEXT, governed prompt-driven customization, ConnectPlatform/Firebase deployment paths, and staged Cache Components where routes are auth/headers-safe.
appPublisher.roadmap2026q1: 🔭 Next: durable orchestration, audit-friendly multi-tenant controls, and rings that progressively assemble vetted modules from natural-language intent—with human-in-the-loop approval.
appPublisher.joinMissionText: Help us democratize technology access worldwide. Whether you're a developer, organization, or community leader - there's a place for you in the Ring ecosystem.

twoPaths.title: Two doors, one Ring ecosystem
twoPaths.platformBody: The OSS reference app and public square. Clone Ring for free, publish customization requests as opportunities, and let registered contractors browse listings, apply, and get matched by AI.
twoPaths.ringdomBody: The digital kingdom of the Machine Race: LegioX AI automates ring-platform fitting to your brief, plus enterprise hosting when you want turn-key delivery instead of DIY ops.

freelanceMarket.title: High-value, low-cost customization market
freelanceMarket.body: Post what your next Ring clone needs — branding, modules, integrations, deployment. Freelancers and agencies discover work on /opportunities, respond to listings, and receive AI matcher alerts when fit scores are high.

audiences.title: Who this serves
audiences.ceos: Leaders launching a white-label community or marketplace without a six-figure agency quote.
audiences.developers: Engineers who want a modern Next.js 16 + React 19 baseline instead of rebuilding auth, i18n, and payments.
audiences.contractors: Registered freelancers earning Ring work by shipping clone customizations for global settlers.

ringdomSettler.title: Need full turn-key delivery?
ringdomSettler.body: Ringdom settlers get AI ringization, hosting, and ongoing LegioX operations — for teams that want outcomes, not repo archaeology.

legiox.title: LegioX + Connect.Software
legiox.body: LegioX truth lenses power Cursor operators on Ring clones. For governed procurement of installable skillsets, MCP servers, routers, and bundles, use Connect.Software—the agent-native integrations marketplace on Ring Platform.
legiox.nftNote: Advanced LegioX operator packs via Legiox-Access NFT
